subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Cause of God and bondsman at His Most Great Threshold, Jinab-i-Mirza Abdullah! For some time now, in the wilderness of deprivation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم امرالله و ای بنده درگاه کبریا جناب میرزا عبدالله چندی بود که در صحرای حرمان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
